items.claim: Masi has lost a significant number of his recent fights.
items.quote: masi has lost quite a bit recently

items.claim: Javier Reyes's win over Douglas Silva de Andrade involved manhandling him and controlling the pace.
items.quote: he really manhandles Douglas Silva de Andrade and doesn't really give Andrade much room to breathe in that fight

items.claim: Javier Reyes possesses superior striking skills compared to O'Flaherty.
items.quote: I just think Reyes has better hands

items.claim: O'Flaherty has a poor success rate with takedowns in the UFC, currently 1 for 14.
items.quote: 1-14 so far in the UFC shooting takedowns

items.claim: Javier Reyes has high-level submission skills, specifically with chokes.
items.quote: Reyes has some nasty chokes, too

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev Ruziboev has a high volume of professional MMA fights.
items.quote: Ruziboev with so many professional mixed martial arts fights.

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev Ruziboev has been inactive since his scheduled fight against Bryan Battle was cancelled.
items.quote: Roosmalen has not been booked in a fight since now of course this Saturday against Pulaev.

items.claim: Bryan Battle missed weight for his scheduled fight against Ruziboev.
items.quote: Battle misses weight and the UFC of course cuts Battle.
